# Usage

<!-- This is generated by scripts/generate-usage.sh. Don't edit this file directly. -->

```console
$ langcheck --help
NAME:
   langcheck - A new cli application

USAGE:
   langcheck [global options] [command [command options]]

VERSION:
   0.0.1-0

COMMANDS:
   check       
   version     Show version
   help, h     Shows a list of commands or help for one command
   completion  Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell

GLOBAL OPTIONS:
   --help, -h     show help
   --version, -v  print the version
```

## langcheck check

```console
$ langcheck check --help
NAME:
   langcheck check

USAGE:
   langcheck check [options] [files ...] 

OPTIONS:
   --text string [ --text string ]  text to check
   --help, -h                       show help
```

## langcheck version

```console
$ langcheck version --help
NAME:
   langcheck version - Show version

USAGE:
   langcheck version [options]

OPTIONS:
   --json, -j  Output version in JSON format
   --help, -h  show help
```

## langcheck completion

```console
$ langcheck completion --help
NAME:
   langcheck completion - Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell

USAGE:
   langcheck completion [command [command options]]

DESCRIPTION:
   Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell.
   Source the output to enable completion.

   # .bashrc
   source <(langcheck completion bash)

   # .zshrc
   source <(langcheck completion zsh)

   # fish
   langcheck completion fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/langcheck.fish

   # Powershell
   Output the script to path/to/autocomplete/langcheck.ps1 an run it.


COMMANDS:
   bash  Output bash completion script
   zsh   Output zsh completion script
   fish  Output fish completion script
   pwsh  Output pwsh completion script

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

### completion bash

```console
$ completion bash --help
NAME:
   langcheck completion bash - Output bash completion script

USAGE:
   langcheck completion bash [options]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

### completion zsh

```console
$ completion zsh --help
NAME:
   langcheck completion zsh - Output zsh completion script

USAGE:
   langcheck completion zsh [options]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

### completion fish

```console
$ completion fish --help
NAME:
   langcheck completion fish - Output fish completion script

USAGE:
   langcheck completion fish [options]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

### completion pwsh

```console
$ completion pwsh --help
NAME:
   langcheck completion pwsh - Output pwsh completion script

USAGE:
   langcheck completion pwsh [options]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```
